articles.title: About me
articles.contents:
title: “About me” description: |
Hi! I am a PhD candidate in sociology at Duke University. I study identity and emotion processes, particularly in the areas of status inequality and cultural change. Before graduate school, I studied sociology and cognitive science at the University of Georgia. In my free time, I like to take my dog for walks around Durham, read (currently: Paul Takes the form of a Mortal Girl), and see live music at the Pinhook or Cat’s Cradle.
